slides.title: The lung threat *you can't see or smell*
slides.sub: Radon is a radioactive gas that seeps up from soil into homes. It is the top cause of lung cancer in people who never smoked.

slides.title: A gas from the ground
slides.body: Radon forms as uranium in soil and rock breaks down. It rises and *collects indoors*, especially in basements and lower floors.

slides.title: Damage at the cell level
slides.body: As radon decays it releases tiny particles you breathe in. Over years they *can damage lung-cell DNA* and raise cancer risk.

slides.title: A leading cause, often missed
slides.body: Radon is *the top non-smoking cause* of lung cancer. It is invisible, odorless, and rarely on anyone's radar.

slides.title: Test, then vent
slides.body: A *cheap home test kit* tells you your level in days. If it is high, a venting system can pull the gas out and away.

slides.title: A silent risk removed
slides.body: One test and one fix can *protect your lungs for decades*. It is a rare longevity win you only have to do once.

slides.title: Small habits, *fewer hidden risks*
slides.body: Vibe Health turns the daily basics into one number: it scores your sleep, food, movement and steps so the choices that protect your health stay simple.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
There is a lung-cancer risk hiding in many homes, and most people have never tested for it. 🌿

Radon seeps up from soil, its decay particles can damage lung-cell DNA, and it is the top cause of lung cancer in non-smokers. A cheap test and a vent can remove it. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns the daily basics into one simple score → link in bio.
youtube_title: Radon: The Silent Lung Cancer Risk in Your Home
